title: Pack N Trade 14 Inch Round Cake Boards – Pack of 10 Single Thick 2mm Cardboard, Reusable & Sturdy Cake Base for Baking, Decorating, and Display
features: 【Premium Single Thickness】Crafted with 2mm thick premium cake board round, these boards provide a sturdy base for all cake types, ensuring stability during transport and display.
【Elegant Foil Finish】Featuring a foil finish on single side, these cake cards boards add a touch of sophistication to your cake presentations while offering moisture resistance.
【Reusable & Durable】Designed for multiple uses, these boards maintain their shape and appearance, making them a cost-effective choice for both home bakers and professionals.
【Perfect Size for Versatility】Measuring 14 inches, these round boards are ideal for various cake sizes and styles, from single-layer to multi-tiered creations.
【Enhances Cake Presentation】The sleek design and sturdy construction not only support your cakes but also enhance their overall presentation, making them stand out on Christmas & any occasion.
description: The Pack N Trade 14 Inch Round Cake Boards – Pack of 10 are designed to give bakers a strong, stylish, and reusable foundation for all cake creations. Made from premium 2mm single thick cake board, these sturdy cake bases provide excellent support for transporting, displaying, and decorating cakes. Each cake board features a foil finish on single side, offering moisture and grease resistance while enhancing the overall appearance of your desserts. The elegant foil design adds a professional touch, making these cake boards ideal for bakeries, home baking, and special occasions. With a convenient 14-inch round size, these cake boards are versatile enough for birthday cakes, wedding cakes, cheesecakes, cupcakes, and multi-tiered desserts. Their durable construction ensures stability, while their reusable design makes them a cost-effective choice for bakers. Whether you need cake decorating supplies for a celebration or a reliable cake base for transport, these foil-finished single thick cake boards deliver both strength and presentation. Perfect for Christmas, parties, and professional displays, they’re a must-have addition to your baking essentials.
